text.title: ideation-methods Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ideation-methods as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Rushing through all lenses in under 15 minutes total.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The disruptive ideas (Eliminate, Reverse) require more cognitive effort and only emerge after the obvious ideas are exhausted. Rushing produces the same ideas brainstorming produces without structure.
